title: Spectrophotometric determination of nickel(II) in aqueous medium using 1-phenyl-1,2-propanedione-2-oxime
author: N. B. L. Prasad
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Oil Technological Research Institute, JNTU, Anantapur-5 15 001, India 
Department of Chemistry, Sri Krishnadevaraya University, Anantapur-5 15 003, India 
 Fax : 91-8554-29043 
 Manuscript received 11 September 2002, revised 20 October 2003, accepted 6 April 2004  

 The reagent 1-phenyl-1,2-propanedione-2-oxime thiosemicarbazone (PPDOT) gives brownish yellow coloured complex with 
nickel(II) in sodium acetate-acetic acid buffer solution. The molar absorptivity and Sandell's sensitivity of Ni II -PPDOT complex 
are 1.2 x 10 4  dm 3  mol -1  cm -1  at 395 nm and 0.0050 µg cm -2 , respectively. PPDOT has been used for the spectrophotometric 
determination of nickeI(II) in hydrogenated vegetable oil and chocolate.
